productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Green Sweater
description: Composition Green sleeveless sweater made of 80% lambswool and 20% nylon, has ribbed armholes, ribbing around the v-neck and hem, and appliquéd branding on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only Stylish to the hilt and offering snug comfort, this sweater from US Polo makes a great addition to your wardrobe. Layer over tees, denims and suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
